features.title: Database Schema
features.description: Set up Prisma schema with all core models for Quadratic
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace model with name, slug, settings
User model with email, name, avatar, preferences
Team model with name, key, color, workspace relation
Project model with name, description, status, team relation
Issue model with title, description, status, priority, assignee, creator, project, team, cycle, labels
Cycle model with name, startDate, endDate, team relation
Label model with name, color, team relation
Comment model with content, author, issue relation
All relations properly defined with foreign keys

features.title: Authentication System
features.description: Configure Better Auth with credentials provider and workspace creation flow
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Better Auth is properly configured in src/server/better-auth/
Create login page with email/password using shadcn/ui
Create registration page with workspace creation
Set up Better Auth client for frontend authentication
Create auth middleware for protected routes
Redirect to onboarding for new users

features.title: Application Layout Shell
features.description: Create the main app layout with sidebar navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Collapsible left sidebar with team/project navigation
Top header with workspace switcher and search button

features.title: Issue CRUD Operations
features.description: Build tRPC procedures for creating, reading, updating, deleting issues
acceptanceCriteria: Create issue procedure with title, description, team, project, assignee, priority, labels
Get issue by ID procedure with all relations
Update issue procedure for all fields
List issues with filtering (status, assignee, project, label)

features.title: Issue List View
features.description: Create the main issues list with filtering and grouping
acceptanceCriteria: Table view of issues showing identifier, title, status, priority, assignee, labels
Filter sidebar with status, assignee, priority, label filters
Group by dropdown (status, assignee, priority, project, none)
Quick actions (change status, assign, set priority)
Virtual scrolling for performance with 1000+ issues
Keyboard navigation (j/k for up/down, enter to open)

features.title: Issue Board View (Kanban)
features.description: Build drag-and-drop Kanban board for issue management
acceptanceCriteria: Kanban columns for each status (Backlog, Todo, In Progress, Done, Cancelled)
Drag and drop to change status (using @dnd-kit)
Issue cards showing title, identifier, priority, assignee avatar
Create issue button in each column

features.title: Issue Detail Page
features.description: Full-page issue view with editing and comments
acceptanceCriteria: Rich text description editor (use TipTap or similar)
Priority selector (No Priority, Low, Medium, High, Urgent)

features.title: Cycles (Sprints)
features.description: Implement sprint/cycle management (Linear-style)
acceptanceCriteria: Create cycle modal with name, start date, end date
Cycle detail page showing assigned issues
Cycle board view (Kanban filtered by cycle)

features.title: Project Management
features.description: Build project pages with roadmap and issue organization
acceptanceCriteria: Create project modal with name, description, team, color
Project detail page with overview tab
Project board view (issues filtered by project)

features.title: Team Management
features.description: Team creation and member management
acceptanceCriteria: Create team with name, key (e.g., ENG), color
Team issues view (all issues assigned to team)

features.title: Label System
features.description: Color-coded labels for issue categorization
acceptanceCriteria: Create label modal with name and color picker
Label management page listing all labels
Filter by label in list/board views
Quick label add/remove from issue detail

features.title: Command Palette
features.description: Cmd+K command palette for navigation and actions
acceptanceCriteria: Quick navigation to pages (Issues, Projects, Cycles, Teams)
Actions: Create issue, Create project, Start cycle

features.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Keyboard navigation throughout app (Linear-style)
acceptanceCriteria: ? shortcut opens keyboard shortcuts help modal
g then i - Go to Issues
g then p - Go to Projects
g then c - Go to Cycles
All shortcuts shown in UI tooltips

features.title: Global Search
features.description: Full-text search across all entities
acceptanceCriteria: Search issues by title, description, identifier

features.title: Notification System
features.description: In-app notifications for issue updates
acceptanceCriteria: Notification bell icon in header with badge
Notification types: assigned, mentioned, status changed, commented
Click notification to navigate to issue
Real-time updates via polling or SSE

features.title: Cycle Analytics
features.description: Velocity and burndown charts for cycles

features.title: Issue Templates
features.description: Template system for common issue types
acceptanceCriteria: Create template modal with title/description defaults
Default templates: Bug Report, Feature Request, Task

features.title: Settings Pages
features.description: User and workspace settings

features.title: Rich Text Editor (TipTap)
features.description: Integrate TipTap editor for issue descriptions with collaborative-style editing
acceptanceCriteria: Install and configure TipTap with StarterKit extensions
Custom toolbar with bold, italic, code, headings, lists, links, code blocks
Auto-save descriptions on blur or after 2s debounce
Keyboard shortcuts within editor (Cmd+B for bold, etc.)

features.title: Real-time Updates
features.description: Implement real-time synchronization using Server-Sent Events or polling
acceptanceCriteria: Set up SSE endpoint for real-time issue updates
Invalidate tRPC cache when issues are updated remotely
Show 'someone is editing' indicator when conflict detected
Connection status indicator in UI (connected, reconnecting, offline)
Batch rapid updates (don't spam the API)

features.title: Workflow Automations
features.description: Simple automation rules for issue lifecycle events
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger types: issue created, status changed, assignee changed, priority changed
Action types: change status, change assignee, add label, send notification, update priority
Condition filters: team, project, label, priority level
Built-in templates: 'Auto-assign to creator', 'Move to backlog when unassigned'

features.title: GitHub Integration
features.description: Connect issues to GitHub PRs and commits
acceptanceCriteria: Link issue to GitHub PR by URL
Display linked PRs in issue detail page
Extract commit messages that reference issues (fixes ENG-123)
Auto-close issues when PR is merged (optional automation)
API rate limiting and caching for GitHub requests

features.title: Time Tracking
features.description: Track time spent on issues with estimates and actuals
acceptanceCriteria: Add estimated time field to issues (hours)
Log time entries (manual entry with description)
Time tracking tab in issue detail

features.title: API Keys & Webhooks
features.description: External API access for integrations and automation
acceptanceCriteria: Generate API keys with scopes (read, write, admin)
API key management page (create, revoke, copy)

features.title: Accessibility Audit
features.description: Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Keyboard navigation works for all features
Color contrast ratios meet AA standards
Focus management for modals and dialogs
ARIA live regions for dynamic updates
Accessible error messages and form validation

features.title: Data Import & Export
features.description: Import issues from other tools and export for backup/analysis
acceptanceCriteria: Import validation and preview before committing
Export includes all metadata (labels, comments, history)

features.title: Custom Fields
features.description: Allow teams to define custom fields for issues
acceptanceCriteria: Custom field types: text, number, select, multi-select, date, URL
Create custom field at workspace or team level
Filter issues by custom field values
Custom field display in issue list and detail views

features.title: UI Polish & Performance
features.description: Final polish, animations, and performance optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Performance: Issue list scrolls smoothly with 500+ items
Subtle shadows and borders (no heavy visual noise)
Micro-interactions on buttons and interactive elements
Hover states for all interactive components
Icon consistency (use same icon set throughout)

features.title: Deployment Documentation
features.description: Create comprehensive deployment guide with environment variables and platform-specific instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Create DEPLOYMENT.md file with complete setup instructions
List all required environment variables with descriptions
Document Vercel deployment steps (including adapter config)
Explain database setup (SQLite for simple, PostgreSQL for production)
Document Better Auth environment variables (BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, etc.)
Include troubleshooting section for common deployment issues
